(**CONTINUATION OF RULING RE DEFENDANTS CITIMORTGAGE, INC., CR TITLE SERVICES, INC. AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC. DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT**) DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION (IIED) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THERE IS NO OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AS REQUIRED FOR THIS CLAIM. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION (QUIET TITLE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD MORE FACTS TO SUPPORT THIS CLAIM. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 11TH CAUSE OF ACTION (DECLARATORY RELIEF) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS BASED ON PAST EVENTS AND IS SUPERFLUOUS OF THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. THE COURT HAS DISCRETION TO DISMISS PER CCP 1061. PLAINTIFF HAS 30 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO FILE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT HAS 30 DAYS TO RESPOND TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

(**CONTINUATION OF RULING RE: DEFENDANTS CITIMORTGAGE, INC., CR TITLE SERVICES, INC. AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC. DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT**) DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION (UCL) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THE CAUSE OF ACTION SHOULD EXPRESSLY IDENTIFY WHAT STATUTES WERE VIOLATED. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF HAS STANDING TO MAINTAIN THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO WAIT FOR FORECLOSURE TO OCCUR TO BRING THIS CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC2941.9) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT CORRECTLY NOTES THAT THE STATUTE DOES NOT APPLY TO PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF IMPLIED COVENANT) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF NEED TO PLEAD A CONTRACT. (**SEE NEXT ENTRY FOR CONTINUATION OF RULING**)

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS; COMPLAINT; NTC OF MTN FOR TRO; ETC FILED BY PLAINTIFF FORBES, GERTHERINE AS EXECUTOR OF THE ESTATE OF BESSIE WRIGHT SERVED JUL-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS CITIMORTGAGE, INC., CR TITLE SERVICES, INC. AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC. DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT - ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING (& ADOPTED AS MODIFIED AS TO THE 1ST & 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION) EXCEPT AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION, THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. ------------------ AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC2923.5) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (BREACH OF CONTRACT) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. THERE ARE NOT ALLEGATIONS TO SUPPORT THE CAUSE OF ACTION. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF SHOULD PLEAD THE BREACH OF CONTRACT AND FRAUD CAUSES OF ACTION SEPARATELY. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC2932.5) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF LACKS STANDING BECAUSE IT IS NOT A HOLDER OF THE NOTE IN DUE COURSE. SEE FERGUSON V. AVELO MORTGAGE, LLC (2011) 195 CAL.APP.4TH 1618. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC2934) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT CORRECTLY NOTES THAT CC2934 PROVIDES THAT AN ASSIGNMENT "MAY" BE RECORDED AND PLAINTIFF'S RELIANCE ON 2934A DOES NOT APPLY TO THIS CASE. FURTHER, THE SUBSTITUTION OF TRUSTEE THAT WAS RECORDED IS ATTACHED TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC1572) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF ATTEMPTS TO PLEAD FRAUD BUT THERE ARE NO FACTS PROVIDED TO SUPPORT THE CAUSE OF ACTION. (**SEE NEXT ENTRY FOR CONTINUATION OF RULING**)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF GERTHERINE FORBES MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE HONORABLE JUDGE LORETTA GIORGI'S RULING TO SUSTAIN THE DEMURRER OF DEFENDANT'S TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ON AUGUST 1, 2011. ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. -- AFTER HEARING, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: COURT ADOPTS TENTATIVE RULING TO DENY MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. HOWEVER, THE COURT IS BASING THIS ON THE MERITS OF PLAINTIFF'S ARGUMENTS. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVIDED NEW FACTS OR LAW AS REQUIRED FOR THIS MOTION. MOREOVER, THE ORDER HAS NOT BEEN SIGNED OR ENTERED INTO THE DOCKET. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (NOTE: PLAINTIFF'S ORAL REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION WAS INITIALLY GRANTED IN COURT. HOWEVER, AFTER HEARING, THE COURT NOW DENIES THAT REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Text Ruling

PLAINTIFF GERTHERINE FORBES MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE HONORABLE JUDGE LORETTA GIORGI'S RULING TO SUSTAIN THE DEMURRER OF DEFENDANT'S TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ON AUGUST 1, 2011.

RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission.

(PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (Note: Plaintiff's oral request for leave to amend the 4th cause of action was initially granted in Court. However, after hearing, the Court now denies that request for leave to amend.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS CITIMORTGAGE, INC., CR TITLE SERVICES, INC. AND MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEM, INC. DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Gertherine Forbes, 510/385-5035 pltf & opposing party in propria persona (appearing via CourtCall); Kimberly A. Paese, Esq. of Wolfe & Wyman LLP 925/280-0004 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (& adopted as modified as to the 1st & 7th causes of action) except as to the 4th cause of action, the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Tentative ruling adopted as to the 4th cause of action.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 1st cause of action (Violation of CC2923.5) is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (breach of contract) is sustained with leave to amend. There are not allegations to support the cause of action. Further, Plaintiff should plead the breach of contract and fraud causes of action separately.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action (Violation of CC2932.5) is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff lacks standing because it is not a holder of the note in due course. See Ferguson v. Avelo Mortgage, LLC (2011) 195 Cal.App.4th 1618.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 4th cause of action (Violation of CC2934) is sustained without leave to amend. Defendant correctly notes that CC2934 provides that an assignment "may" be recorded and Plaintiff's reliance on 2934a does not apply to this case. Further, the substitution of trustee that was recorded is attached to the Amended Complaint.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 5th cause of action (Violation of CC1572) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff attempts to plead fraud but there are no facts provided to support the cause of action.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 6th cause of action (UCL) is sustained with leave to amend. The cause of action should expressly identify what statutes were violated. Further, Plaintiff has standing to maintain this cause of action. Plaintiff does not need to wait for foreclosure to occur to bring this cause of action.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 7th cause of action (Violation of CC2941.9) is sustained with leave to amend. Defendant correctly notes that the statUTE does not apply to Plaintiff.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 8th cause of action (Breach of Implied Covenant) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff need to plead a contract.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 9th cause of action (IIED) is sustained without leave to amend. There is no outrageous conduct as required for this claim.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 10th cause of action (Quiet Title) is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead more facts to support this claim.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 11th cause of action (Declaratory Relief) is sustained without leave to amend. This cause of action is based on past events and is superfluous of the other causes of action. The Court has discretion to dismiss per CCP 1061.
Plaintiff has 30 days from notice of entry of order to file the amended complaint. Defendant has 30 days to respond to the amended complaint. Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
